message:
fix(gui,term): extend saturating_sub hardening to overlays, screen, and image placement

Continue the division-by-zero / underflow sweep to five more call sites:

- overlay/copy.rs: saturating_sub(1) when wrapping backwards through
  search results with an empty results list
- overlay/quickselect.rs: same pattern in quick-select match navigation
- overlay/selector.rs: saturating_sub(1) in move_down() to prevent
  underflow when filtered_entries is empty
- term/screen.rs: saturating_sub(1) in stable_row_to_phys fallback
  when self.lines is empty
- terminalstate/image.rs: clamp physical_cols and physical_rows with
  .max(1) before dividing pixel_width/pixel_height for cell size

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
